usage: vllm serve [model_tag] [options]

Start the vLLM OpenAI Compatible API server.

positional arguments:
  model_tag             The model tag to serve (optional if specified in config)

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --headless
  --api-server-count API_SERVER_COUNT
  --config CONFIG
  --host HOST
  --port PORT
  --uds UDS
  --uvicorn-log-level {debug,info,warning,error,critical,trace}
  --disable-uvicorn-access-log
  --allow-credentials
  --allowed-origins ALLOWED_ORIGINS [ALLOWED_ORIGINS ...]
  --allowed-methods ALLOWED_METHODS [ALLOWED_METHODS ...]
  --allowed-headers ALLOWED_HEADERS [ALLOWED_HEADERS ...]
  --api-key API_KEY [API_KEY ...]
  --lora-modules LORA_MODULES [LORA_MODULES ...]
  --prompt-adapters PROMPT_ADAPTERS [PROMPT_ADAPTERS ...]
  --chat-template CHAT_TEMPLATE
  --chat-template-content-format {auto,string,openai}
  --response-role RESPONSE_ROLE
  --ssl-keyfile SSL_KEYFILE
  --ssl-certfile SSL_CERTFILE
  --ssl-ca-certs SSL_CA_CERTS
  --enable-ssl-refresh
  --ssl-cert-reqs SSL_CERT_REQS
  --root-path ROOT_PATH
  --middleware MIDDLEWARE
  --return-tokens-as-token-ids
  --disable-frontend-multiprocessing
  --enable-request-id-headers
  --enable-auto-tool-choice
  --exclude-tools-when-tool-choice-none
  --tool-call-parser TOOL_CALL_PARSER
  --tool-parser-plugin TOOL_PARSER_PLUGIN
  --log-config-file LOG_CONFIG_FILE
  --max-log-len MAX_LOG_LEN
  --disable-log-requests
  --enable-log-outputs
  --h11-max-incomplete-event-size H11_MAX_INCOMPLETE_EVENT_SIZE
  --h11-max-header-count H11_MAX_HEADER_COUNT
  --enable-server-load-tracking
  --enable-force-include-usage
  --enable-tokenizer-info-endpoint
  --enable-log-token-usage
  --enable-prompt-tokens-details
  --model-loader-extra-config MODEL_LOADER_EXTRA_CONFIG
  --served-model-name SERVED_MODEL_NAME [SERVED_MODEL_NAME ...]
  --disable-fastapi-docs
  --enable-prompt-embeds

ModelConfig:
  --model MODEL
  --runner {auto,generate,pooling,draft,transcription}
  --convert {auto,none,embed,classify,reward}
  --task TASK
  --tokenizer TOKENIZER
  --tokenizer-mode {auto,slow,mistral,custom}
  --trust-remote-code
  --allowed-local-media-path ALLOWED_LOCAL_MEDIA_PATH
  --allowed-media-domains ALLOWED_MEDIA_DOMAINS [ALLOWED_MEDIA_DOMAINS ...]
  --revision REVISION
  --code-revision CODE_REVISION
  --tokenizer-revision TOKENIZER_REVISION
  --max-model-len MAX_MODEL_LEN
  --speculative-config SPECULATIVE_CONFIG
  --quantization QUANTIZATION
  --rope-scaling ROPE_SCALING
  --rope-theta ROPE_THETA
  --hf-token HF_TOKEN
  --hf-overrides HF_OVERRIDES
  --enforce-eager
  --max-seq-len-to-capture MAX_SEQ_LEN_TO_CAPTURE
  --max-logprobs MAX_LOGPROBS
  --logprobs-mode {raw,raw_logprobs,processed,processed_logprobs}
  --disable-sliding-window
  --disable-cascade-attn
  --skip-tokenizer-init
  --enable-prompt-embeds
  --served-model-name SERVED_MODEL_NAME [SERVED_MODEL_NAME ...]
  --generation-config GENERATION_CONFIG
  --override-generation-config OVERRIDE_GENERATION_CONFIG
  --enable-sleep-mode
  --model-impl {auto,vllm,transformers,terratorch}
  --override-attention-dtype OVERRIDE_ATTENTION_DTYPE
  --logits-processor-pattern LOGITS_PROCESSOR_PATTERN
  --io-processor-plugin IO_PROCESSOR_PLUGIN
  --config-format {auto,hf,mistral}
  --load-format {auto,pt,safetensors,npcache,dummy,tensorizer,sharded_state,bitsandbytes,gguf,runai_streamer,fastsafetensors}
  --download-dir DOWNLOAD_DIR
  --model-loader-extra-config MODEL_LOADER_EXTRA_CONFIG
  --ignore-patterns IGNORE_PATTERNS [IGNORE_PATTERNS ...]
  --use-tqdm-on-load
  --pt-load-map-location PT_LOAD_MAP_LOCATION
  --seed SEED
  --dtype {auto,bfloat16,float16,float32,half}

CacheConfig:
  --block-size {1,8,16,32,64,128}
  --gpu-memory-utilization GPU_MEMORY_UTILIZATION
  --kv-cache-memory-bytes KV_CACHE_MEMORY_BYTES
  --swap-space SWAP_SPACE
  --kv-cache-dtype {auto,bfloat16,fp8,fp8_e4m3,fp8_e5m2,fp8_inc,float16}
  --num-gpu-blocks-override NUM_GPU_BLOCKS_OVERRIDE
  --enable-prefix-caching
  --no-enable-prefix-caching
  --prefix-caching-hash-algo {builtin,sha256,sha256_cbor,xxhash,xxhash_cbor}
  --calculate-kv-scales
  --kv-sharing-fast-prefill
  --mamba-cache-dtype {auto,bfloat16,float16,float32}
  --mamba-ssm-cache-dtype {auto,bfloat16,float16,float32}
  --mamba-block-size MAMBA_BLOCK_SIZE
  --mamba-cache-mode {align,all,none}
  --kv-offloading-size KV_OFFLOADING_SIZE
  --kv-offloading-backend {native,lmcache}
  --offload-backend OFFLOAD_BACKEND
  --cpu-offload-gb CPU_OFFLOAD_GB

ParallelConfig:
  --pipeline-parallel-size PIPELINE_PARALLEL_SIZE
  --tensor-parallel-size TENSOR_PARALLEL_SIZE
  --data-parallel-size DATA_PARALLEL_SIZE
  --data-parallel-rank DATA_PARALLEL_RANK
  --data-parallel-start-rank DATA_PARALLEL_START_RANK
  --data-parallel-size-local DATA_PARALLEL_SIZE_LOCAL
  --data-parallel-address DATA_PARALLEL_ADDRESS
  --data-parallel-rpc-port DATA_PARALLEL_RPC_PORT
  --data-parallel-backend {mp,ray}
  --data-parallel-hybrid-lb
  --enable-expert-parallel
  --expert-placement-strategy {linear,round_robin}
  --enable-eplb
  --eplb-config EPLB_CONFIG
  --max-parallel-loading-workers MAX_PARALLEL_LOADING_WORKERS
  --disable-custom-all-reduce
  --worker-cls WORKER_CLS
  --worker-extension-cls WORKER_EXTENSION_CLS
  --enable-multimodal-encoder-data-parallel

SchedulerConfig:
  --max-num-batched-tokens MAX_NUM_BATCHED_TOKENS
  --max-num-seqs MAX_NUM_SEQS
  --max-num-partial-prefills MAX_NUM_PARTIAL_PREFILLS
  --max-long-partial-prefills MAX_LONG_PARTIAL_PREFILLS
  --long-prefill-token-threshold LONG_PREFILL_TOKEN_THRESHOLD
  --num-lookahead-slots NUM_LOOKAHEAD_SLOTS
  --scheduler-delay-factor SCHEDULER_DELAY_FACTOR
  --preemption-mode {recompute,swap}
  --num-scheduler-steps NUM_SCHEDULER_STEPS
  --multi-step-stream-outputs
  --scheduling-policy {fcfs,priority}
  --scheduler-cls SCHEDULER_CLS
  --disable-chunked-prefill
  --no-enable-chunked-prefill
  --disable-hybrid-kv-cache-manager
  --async-scheduling

CompilationConfig:
  --compilation-config COMPILATION_CONFIG
  --additional-config ADDITIONAL_CONFIG
  --enable-lora
  --max-loras MAX_LORAS
  --max-lora-rank MAX_LORA_RANK
  --lora-dtype {auto,float16,bfloat16,float32}
  --long-lora-scaling-factors LONG_LORA_SCALING_FACTORS
  --max-cpu-loras MAX_CPU_LORAS
  --fully-sharded-loras
  --enable-prompt-adapter
  --max-prompt-adapters MAX_PROMPT_ADAPTERS
  --max-prompt-adapter-token MAX_PROMPT_ADAPTER_TOKEN
  --device {auto,cuda,rocm,cpu,tpu,xpu,hpu,neuron}
  --ray-workers-use-nsight
  --disable-log-stats
  --aggregate-engine-logging
  --enable-chunked-prefill
  --enable-prefix-caching
  --otlp-traces-endpoint OTLP_TRACES_ENDPOINT
  --collect-detailed-traces COLLECT_DETAILED_TRACES [COLLECT_DETAILED_TRACES ...]
  --show-hidden-metrics-for-version SHOW_HIDDEN_METRICS_FOR_VERSION
  --enable-cache-aware-lb
  --enable-pd-disaggregation
